name: Example Campus Cluster
summary: A non-production adapter showing how a site can map generic skills to local HPC policy.

job_submit_notes: Use the debug partition for smoke tests.
Production work should use a project-approved account.

partitions.name: debug
partitions.purpose: Short smoke tests and interactive debugging.

storage.name: home
storage.intended_use: Small source files, scripts, and configuration.

storage.name: project
storage.intended_use: Shared project data and durable workflow outputs.

policies.summary: Compile and submit jobs from login nodes, but run compute-heavy work through Slurm.
Use Apptainer images stored in project or scratch space; avoid writing large image caches to home.
Use Globus for large external transfers and record task ids with analysis outputs.

skill_overrides.notes: Replace <partition> with debug, cpu, or gpu and keep smoke tests under 30 minutes.
Use the gpu partition and confirm local CUDA or ROCm modules before submitting.
Confirm endpoint names and project storage permissions with the local help desk.
